scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @agentverse/config && npm run dev --workspace @agentverse/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @agentverse/config && npm run dev --workspace @agentverse/api
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @agentverse/config && npm run build --workspace @agentverse/api && npm run build --workspace @agentverse/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build --workspace @agentverse/config && npm run build --workspace @agentverse/api
